Override approval incident summary

Summary card that should not be part of the extracted body.

Override approval incident note

Override approval incident notes matter when operators need a precise record of why an approval path stayed active during an ongoing service disruption.

The note ties incident evidence to queue pressure, failover checkpoints, and approver rotation rather than ad hoc operational memory.

Teams still need to confirm grace thresholds, fallback regions, and change logs before an incident note is treated as active approval evidence.

The document emphasizes preserving shared throughput stability and leaving a durable incident-review trail for every override decision.
